name: Miss Fortune

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Love Tap
passive.description_source: Innate:  Miss Fortune's  basic attacks apply a mark that expires when attacking a new enemy. If the enemy was unmarked, this also deals bonus physical damage.

effects.description: Innate: Miss Fortune's basic attacks are empowered to apply a mark that expires upon attacking a new enemy. If the enemy was unmarked, this also deals 50% : 100% (based on level) AD bonus physical damage, halved to 25% : 50% (based on level) AD against minions.

passive.description: Innate: Miss Fortune's basic attacks are empowered to apply a mark that expires upon attacking a new enemy. If the enemy was unmarked, this also deals 50% : 100% (based on level) AD bonus physical damage, halved to 25% : 50% (based on level) AD against minions.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): With Runaan's Hurricane, Love Tap only applies to the primary target.

basic_ability_1.name: Double Up
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Miss Fortune fires a shot at the target enemy that deals physical damage, which then bounces to hit another enemy behind them. This applies  on-hit effects to both enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Miss Fortune fires a shot at the target enemy that deals physical damage, triggers on-attack effects, and bounces to hit another enemy behind them, applying on-hit effects to both enemies hit.

effects.description: Double Up's bounce can critically strike for[ (150% + 15%) damage. ][ 50% bonus critical damage. ]If Double Up kills the primary target, the bounce will critically strike.
The bounce prioritizes units directly behind the primary target. A target does not have to be visible to be hit by the bounce.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Miss Fortune fires a shot at the target enemy that deals physical damage, triggers on-attack effects, and bounces to hit another enemy behind them, applying on-hit effects to both enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Double Up deals basic damage to both targets, but also triggers spell effects by also being tagged as spell damage.

basic_ability_2.name: Strut
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Miss Fortune gains  bonus movement speed after a few seconds without being attacked. This bonus is increased after another few seconds, and is granted instantly whenever Strut is cast.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Miss Fortune gains bonus movement speed after 4 seconds without taking non- persistent damage.
Passive: Miss Fortune gains bonus movement speed after 4 seconds without taking non- persistent damage.
Active: Miss Fortune gains bonus attack speed for 4 seconds.

effects.description: Marking a new target with Love Tap reduces Strut's current cooldown by 2 seconds.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Miss Fortune gains bonus movement speed after 4 seconds without taking non- persistent damage. This bonus is increased after another 3 seconds, and is granted instantly whenever Strut is cast.

basic_ability_3.name: Make It Rain
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Miss Fortune casts a storm of bullets at the target location for a short time, which continually deals magic damage and  slows enemies within.

effects.context_notes: Active: Miss Fortune casts a storm of bullets at the target location for 2 seconds, granting sight of the area, dealing magic damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies within, and slowing them by 40% (+ 6% per 100 AP).

Active: Miss Fortune casts a storm of bullets at the target location for 2 seconds, granting sight of the area, dealing magic damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies within, and slowing them by 40% (+ 6% per 100 AP).

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Miss Fortune casts a storm of bullets at the target location for 2 seconds, granting sight of the area, dealing magic damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies within, and slowing them by 40% (+ 6% per 100 AP).
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Make It Rain's slow cannot be cleansed.

ultimate.name: Bullet Time

effects.context_notes: Active: Miss Fortune channels for up to 3 seconds, firing a number of waves of bullets in the target direction.
Active: Miss Fortune channels for up to 3 seconds, firing a number of waves of bullets in the target direction.
Active: Miss Fortune channels for up to 3 seconds, firing a number of waves of bullets in the target direction.
Active: Miss Fortune channels for up to 3 seconds, firing a number of waves of bullets in the target direction.

effects.description: Each of the waves can critically strike for (130% + 9%) damage.

ultimate.description: Active: Miss Fortune channels for up to 3 seconds, firing a number of waves of bullets in the target direction. Each wave is in a spread of 6 projectiles that deals physical damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The damage dealt by each wave of Bullet Time is calculated when the wave reaches the target.
ultimate.description_source: Active: Miss Fortune channels for up to 3 seconds, firing a number of waves of bullets in the target direction. Each wave is in a spread of 6 projectiles that deals physical damage to enemies hit.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
